subscribe.title: Get daily reports by email
subscribe.subtitle: Free. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Powered by AI research agents.
subscribe.successDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to start receiving daily reports.
subscribe.alreadyDesc: This email is already on the list. You'll receive tomorrow's report automatically.

metadata.title: AI Against Parkinson's — Daily Parkinson's Research
metadata.description: Autonomous AI research agent aggregating Parkinson's disease clinical trials, breakthrough treatments, lifestyle interventions, and emerging science. Free daily email.

home.headline: AI Against Parkinson's
home.whoItFor: Built for people navigating a Parkinson's diagnosis and the caregivers who love them.
home.subtitle: Every morning, AI agents search clinical trials, medical journals, and research databases to bring you the latest breakthroughs, trials, and evidence-based tips.
home.apiDescription: Machine-readable format for AI agents and developers.
home.firstReportDesc: The research agent will publish its first report soon.
home.whySubscribeDesc: Every new treatment, clinical trial, and scientific discovery could change someone's life. This report brings those findings straight to your inbox — no jargon, no confusion, just what you need to know.
home.testimonial: When my dad was diagnosed with Parkinson's, I wanted a way to keep up with all the latest breakthroughs and research without having to search through dozens of medical websites. So I built this — so families like ours can quickly understand what works, which trials are recruiting, and what promising treatments are on the horizon.

reports.title: All Reports
reports.noReportsDesc: Reports will appear here once the research agent runs.
reports.apiSectionDesc: Access all reports as JSON for AI agents and integrations.

report.generatedBy: Generated autonomously by AI research agents

about.title: About This Project
about.founderText:
I built this after a family member was diagnosed with Parkinson's. After spending hours searching clinical trials, treatment research, and care resources — I realized there wasn't a single place that aggregated all of it, updated daily, and was written for patients instead of researchers.

So I built one. Every morning, AI research agents search clinical trials, medical journals, and emerging science — so you don't have to.
about.researchAgentDesc: Every morning at 7:00 AM CDT, an autonomous AI research agent springs to life. It spawns multiple specialized sub-agents that simultaneously search:
searchTargets: Medical journals (NEJM, Lancet Neurology, JAMA) for breakthrough findings
Research databases for lifestyle intervention studies
Preprint servers and conference proceedings for emerging science

clinicalTrials.title: Clinical Trials
clinicalTrials.desc: Active recruiting trials, Phase 2/3 results, eligibility requirements, intervention types, and locations.

breakthroughs.title: Breakthrough Treatments
breakthroughs.desc: FDA approvals, drug mechanisms, clinical evidence summaries, and emerging therapeutic targets.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle Interventions
lifestyle.desc: Exercise protocols, dietary recommendations, sleep optimization, and stress management strategies.

emerging.title: Emerging Research
emerging.desc: Novel therapeutic targets, biomarker discoveries, diagnostic advances, and preliminary findings from preprint servers.

privacyItems: No personal data — reports contain zero patient or personal information
Aggregate research only — we compile public research, not private data
Medical disclaimers — every report includes clear disclaimers
Transparent methodology — all research sources are cited
about.apiAccessDesc: This site provides a JSON API for AI agents and developers to consume research data programmatically.
about.disclaimerText: The information provided by AI Against Parkinson's is for general informational purposes only. All information on the site is provided in good faith; however, we make no representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on the site.
about.disclaimerText2: Under no circumstance shall we have any liability to you for any loss or damage of any kind incurred as a result of the use of the site or reliance on any information provided on the site. Your use of the site and your reliance on any information on the site is solely at your own risk.

clinicalTrials.title: Clinical Trials
clinicalTrials.desc: Active recruiting trials, Phase 2/3 results, eligibility criteria

breakthroughs.title: Breakthroughs
breakthroughs.desc: FDA approvals, drug mechanisms, clinical evidence

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle

footer.tagline: Built with care for families navigating Parkinson's.
footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Consult healthcare providers before making treatment decisions.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This report is for informational purposes only. The content is not intended to be a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

footer.tagline: Built with care for families navigating Parkinson's.
footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Consult healthcare providers before making treatment decisions.

confirmed.title: You're confirmed!
confirmed.description: You'll receive your first AI Against Parkinson's report tomorrow morning at 7:00 AM CDT. Expect it in your inbox.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Free hotlines, support programs, and assistance for Parkinson patients and families.

emergency.title: Emergency & Helplines
emergency.pfHelpline: Nurse educators available Mon-Fri, 9am-7pm ET. Get answers about symptoms, treatments, and local resources.
emergency.npfDesc: Free resources, expert care team referrals, and support for patients and families.
emergency.apdaDesc: Information, referrals, support groups, and educational programs nationwide.

clinical.title: Clinical Trials & Research
clinical.clinicalTrialsDesc: Search all recruiting Parkinson clinical trials by location, phase, and intervention type.
clinical.foxTrialDesc: Michael J. Fox Foundation tool to match patients with recruiting trials. Takes 5 minutes to sign up.
clinical.researchMatchDesc: Connect with researchers conducting Parkinson studies. Free to join.

exercise.title: Exercise & Rehabilitation
exercise.rsbDesc: Non-contact boxing program specifically for Parkinson. 900+ affiliates worldwide. Scholarships available.
exercise.lsvtDesc: Therapy method using oversized movements to improve movement quality. Find certified therapists.
exercise.pdWarriorsDesc: Circuit-based exercise program for Parkinson. Virtual and in-person options available.
exercise.danceDesc: Dance classes designed for people with Parkinson. Free online videos and in-person classes.

caregiver.title: Caregiver & Family Support
caregiver.fcaDesc: Nationwide advocacy and support for family caregivers. Respite care guides, online forums, and care navigation.
caregiver.carelinxDesc: Find vetted, affordable in-home caregivers. Insurance accepted. Background-checked professionals.
caregiver.archDesc: Emergency and planned respite care services. Helps caregivers take breaks safely.
caregiver.wellSpouseDesc: Support for spouses caring for chronically ill partners. Mentors, support groups, and advocacy.

financial.title: Financial & Insurance Assistance
financial.medicareDesc: Federal health insurance for 65+. Covers some Parkinson medications, therapy, and equipment.
financial.ssdiDesc: Apply early — takes 2-3 years for approval. Provides monthly benefits for eligible disabled individuals.
financial.pfAssistDesc: Helps navigate insurance, find co-pay assistance, and access medication assistance programs.
financial.needyMedsDesc: Find patient assistance programs for free or reduced-cost medications. Search by drug name.

mental.title: Mental Health & Counseling
mental.crisisTextDesc: Free 24/7 crisis counseling via text. Mental health support when you need it most.
mental.caregiverMentalDesc: Caregiver depression is common. Seek your own counselor — you cannot pour from an empty cup.
mental.pfMentalDesc: Depression and anxiety are common in Parkinson. Help is available — ask your neurologist for referrals.

tech.title: Tech Tools & Assistive Technology
tech.pfTechDesc: Curated list of technology aids for daily living — speech apps, wearables, reminder systems, and more.
tech.liftwareDesc: Electronic stabilizing spoon for tremor compensation during eating. Clinically proven to reduce shake by 70%.
tech.voiceittDesc: Speech recognition app that adapts to atypical speech patterns. Helps with voice commands and communication.
tech.pdAvengersDesc: Community-curated list of apps, devices, and tools recommended by people living with Parkinson.
